header.title: Extensions
header.summary_one: {{count}} extension installed · {{enabled}} injected into every profile at launch
header.summary_other: {{count}} extensions installed · {{enabled}} injected into every profile at launch

caveat.before: Installed extensions are unpacked locally and mounted into each profile via Chromium's
caveat.middle: at launch. They apply on the
caveat.after: of every profile where the extension is enabled. Some hardened stable-Chrome builds restrict unpacked extensions — Softglaze's bundled engine loads them reliably.

importer.title: Import to Team
importer.description: Paste a Chrome Web Store URL or its 32-character ID — Softglaze downloads and unpacks the real package.

permissionNotice: Only Admins and above can manage team extensions. You can view the repository.

empty.noExtDesc: Import a Chrome Web Store extension above to add it to your team repository and inject it into every profile.
empty.noMatchDesc: Try a different name or ID.

confirmRemove: Remove "{{name}}" from the team repository? Its local files will be deleted.
